questions.text: A company uses a database to store customer information.

subparts.text: State what is meant by a database.
The company wants to ensure data security. Describe two methods they could use.

questions.text: Students use computers in their school.

subparts.text: Which of the following are input devices?
Explain the difference between RAM and ROM.
Describe what RAM is used for.
Describe what ROM is used for.

questions.text: Falyaz has created a diary using word processing software. The diary entry for 17th May 2020 is shown.

subparts.text: Write down four formatting features of the word processing software used to make this diary entry.

The original diary entry typed into the word processing software did not include an image. Describe the steps that would be carried out by Falyaz to include in his diary entry an image taken from his digital camera.

Before the website is published it needs to be tested. Write down three different features of the web pages that could be tested. For each feature, describe the method you would use to carry out the test.

questions.text: Name two other sources of digital images apart from using a digital camera.
